title: Foxxys Fixed Saplings (Jungle Edition)
description: Changes the rates of Jungle Saplings dropping from jungle trees to match other wood types
body:
This small pack aims to fix sapling drop rates of jungle saplings.

Jungle Saplings have had their drop rate changed to be in line with other Vanilla Sapling drop rates.

A version which doubles Pale oak and Dark oak sapling drop rates can be found here: https://modrinth.com/datapack/foxxys_fixed_saplings
